mapper.sql: id, from_id, calc_id, status, app_id, model_no, quantity, order_no, trans_type, order_type, dlv_date, supplier_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, item_no, warehouse_code
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.bin_order_detail_split
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.bin_order_detail_split (id, from_id, calc_id, status, app_id, model_no, quantity, order_no, trans_type, order_type, dlv_date, supplier_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time, update_user, create_user, item_no, warehouse_code) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{calcId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.bin_order_detail_split
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_id = #{record.fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
calc_id = #{record.calcId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
app_id = #{record.appId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=CHAR},
dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.bin_order_detail_split set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, from_id = #{record.fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, calc_id = #{record.calcId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, app_id = #{record.appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=CHAR}, dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

from_id = #{fromId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
calc_id = #{calcId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},

warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
